category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a tool for managing dock items; official GitHub repository describes command-line management of dock items.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official GitHub repository name are dockutil.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the project documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/kcrawford/dockutil; per instruction repo is returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitHub repository identify macOS Dock item management.
